keynotes.text: Fruits brown, two-celled with four narrow and long seeds. Taste mucilaginous. Odourless.

indications.text: Diuretic, demulcent, aphrodisiac. Used for impotence in males, nocturnal emissions, gonorrhoea, gleet and incontinence of urine. Infusion, 1 in 20, is taken three times daily. Fluid extract, 10 to 30 drops.
